entries.text: User roles: Professional, Secretary, and Patient — each with tailored access
Patients can now sign up and link to their doctor's clinic via invite code
Patients can book appointments directly from their home screen
Doctors can send push notifications to all their patients at once
Electronic signature — draw and save your signature for prescriptions and records
Duplicate patient prevention — registering the same email now opens the existing record
Secretary role cannot access clinical records or financial settings
